title: Result ingest contract — NormalizedObservation DTO
description: Language-neutral shape of the value object the edge hands the core Result-ingest seam: org.openelisglobal.result.ingest.ResultIngestService.ingest(NormalizedObservation) (core ADR-0003). One DTO = one observation; the analyzer-native rawCode/rawUnit ride beside the normalized loinc/ucumValue so core persists raw evidence next to normalized form. This schema is the SHARED artifact both sides bind to: the edge validates its emitted DTO against it (edge_sim.ingest), and the core integration test should validate the payload it ingests against the same file — so a field rename on either side fails fast instead of drifting silently.

value.description: The observation value as reported by the analyzer (OBX-5), verbatim.

rawUnit.description: Raw vendor unit string as reported (e.g. 10^9/L), preserved.

loinc.description: Normalized LOINC code; empty string when unmapped (tolerant ingest).

ucumValue.description: Normalized UCUM unit; empty string when unmapped (tolerant ingest).

status.description: Normalization status carried onto core result.status (core ADR-0003).
